ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_number" TEXT /* Participant number assigned for the competition */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affiliation of the participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the competition */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the participant's photo */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_information" TEXT /* Medical information of the participant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_code" TEXT /* Code of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the affiliation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the affiliation */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the affiliation was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the affiliation's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the affiliation's social media profiles */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., gymnastics, track and field) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL of the event rules */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "ep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., registered, completed, disqualified) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant for the specific event */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (if applicable) */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the participant's performance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the participant's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "ep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event participation */,
  "d_score" REAL /* Difficulty score */,
  "e_score" REAL /* Execution score */,
  "penalty" REAL /* Penalty score */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score (sum of d_score, e_score, and penalty) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who scored the performance */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score category */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty applied (if any) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_ep_id FOREIGN KEY ("ep_id") REFERENCES event_participants ("ep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation the judge belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the judge (e.g., head judge, assistant judge) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the judge */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the judge has */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification information of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the score category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score category */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the score category in the total score calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "penalty_name" TEXT /* Name of the penalty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "points" REAL /* Number of points deducted for the penalty */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* More detailed description of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, judge, participant) */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
